title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
hints: Notice how operators always follow their operands in this notation. What data structure naturally handles this last-in, first-out relationship?
Use a stack to store numbers. Push operands onto it, and when you encounter an operator, pop the required number of operands to perform the calculation.
Push the result of each operation back onto the stack. After processing all tokens, the single remaining value on the stack is your final answer.
